l	Z	G
assert_array_equal
util)
crackfortranc
TestNoSpacea|
        subroutine subb(k)
          real(8), intent(inout) :: k(:)
          k=k+1
        endsubroutine
        subroutine subc(w,k)
          real(8), intent(in) :: w(:)
          real(8), intent(out) :: k(size(w))
          k=w+1
        endsubroutine
        function t0(value)
          character value
          character t0
          t0 = value
        endfunction
    c
dtyper
arrayZ
float64
moduleZ
subbr

H/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/numpy/f2py/tests/test_crackfortran.py

TestPublicPrivatec
mod.f90r
            module foo
              private
              integer :: a
              public :: setA
              integer :: b
            contains
              subroutine setA(v)
                integer, intent(in) :: v
                a = v
              end subroutine setA
            end module foo
            r
private
vars
attrspec
public
seta
open
write
textwrap

tmp_pathZ
f_pathZ
modr
test_defaultPrivate)
z%TestPublicPrivate.test_defaultPrivatec
            module foo
              public
              integer, private :: a
              public :: setA
            contains
              subroutine setA(v)
                integer, intent(in) :: v
                a = v
              end subroutine setA
            end module foo
            r
test_defaultPublicC
z$TestPublicPrivate.test_defaultPublicN)
TestExternalaY
        integer(8) function external_as_statement(fcn)
        implicit none
        external fcn
        integer(8) :: fcn
        external_as_statement = fcn(0)
        end
        integer(8) function external_as_attribute(fcn)
        implicit none
        integer(8), external :: fcn
        external_as_attribute = fcn(0)
        end
    c
incrl
z5TestExternal.test_external_as_statement.<locals>.incrr-
external_as_statement
test_external_as_statementk
z'TestExternal.test_external_as_statementc
z5TestExternal.test_external_as_attribute.<locals>.incrr-
external_as_attributer1
test_external_as_attributeq
z'TestExternal.test_external_as_attributeN)
TestCrackFortranz
.f90a
      subroutine gh2848( &
        ! first 2 parameters
        par1, par2,&
        ! last 2 parameters
        par3, par4)
        integer, intent(in)  :: par1, par2
        integer, intent(out) :: par3, par4
        par3 = par1
        par4 = par2
      end subroutine gh2848
    c
gh2848)
test_gh2848
TestCrackFortran.test_gh2848N)

numpy.testingr
